_comment: Reference snippet — the tracker's Claude Code hooks (M4, decision #7). Installed 2026-07-07 by merging into ~/.claude/settings.json (user scope, applies to every project; backup kept as settings.json.bak-before-tracker-2026-07-07). Events fire-and-forget the raw hook JSON to the daemon; hook_event_name distinguishes them. UserPromptSubmit/Notification also mark the session as last-interacted for the attention metric.
